title: Integrate Google Tag G-NQHZEVRPBL on the Zürich landing page

requirements.summary: Inject Google Tag (gtag.js) with ID G-NQHZEVRPBL into the Zürich couples landing page, scoped to that page only, following the same pattern used on the Basel couples landing page
acceptanceCriteria: The gtag.js script with ID G-NQHZEVRPBL is loaded only when the Zürich couples landing page is rendered.
The gtag initialization script calls gtag('config', 'G-NQHZEVRPBL') on page load.
No other pages load this tag.
The implementation mirrors the pattern used in BaselCouplesLandingPage.tsx.

file_operations.description: Add Google Tag (gtag.js) with ID G-NQHZEVRPBL using React Helmet, mirroring the exact implementation pattern from BaselCouplesLandingPage.tsx. Include both the external script tag loading https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-NQHZEVRPBL and the inline initialization script that sets up window.dataLayer and calls gtag('config', 'G-NQHZEVRPBL'). Ensure the scripts are scoped to this page component only and execute on page load.
